metadata.description: Kanban board for Condition-Based Inventory Tracking for Games and Cards. Contains original epic task (as reference) and broken-down subtasks (1-2 day units). See ../KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md for breakdown details.
metadata.epicTitle: Condition-Based Inventory Tracking for Games and Cards
metadata.note: This file contains the original epic task. Broken-down subtasks should be added based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md

tasks.title: Condition-Based Inventory Tracking for Games and Cards
tasks.description: Extend inventory system to support condition-based variants (CIB, loose, cartridge only for games; graded/ungraded, condition levels for cards).
tasks.userStory: As a store owner, I want to track inventory with condition-based variants so that I can accurately manage stock for games and cards with different conditions.
acceptanceCriteria: Given an inventory item is a game, when adding to inventory, then user can select condition (CIB, loose, cartridge only, box only)
Given an inventory item is a card, when adding to inventory, then user can select condition (Near Mint, Lightly Played, Moderately Played, etc.) and graded status
Given inventory items, when displayed, then condition is shown clearly for each item
Given inventory search, when filtering by condition, then only items matching selected conditions are shown
Given condition variants, when the same item exists in multiple conditions, then they are tracked as separate inventory entries
Given pricing, when condition is selected, then pricing can vary by condition
tasks.businessValue: Essential for collectibles business. Enables accurate tracking and pricing of items in different conditions.
tasks.technicalNotes: Add Condition field to InventoryItem table. Define condition enums for games and cards. Update UI to support condition selection. Ensure condition is included in search and filtering.
successMetrics: Condition tracking usage: 90%+ of items have condition specified
Condition-based search usage: 60%+ of searches include condition filter
businessRules: Condition is required for all inventory items
Game conditions: CIB (Complete In Box), Loose, Cartridge Only, Box Only
Card conditions: Near Mint, Lightly Played, Moderately Played, Heavily Played, Damaged, plus Graded (with grade number)
Same item in different conditions is tracked separately
tasks.note: This is the original epic task. The subtasks should be broken down into 1-2 day units based on KANBAN-BREAKDOWN-GUIDE.md
